raw_consumer_statement: On approximately XX/XX/year> I received my billing statement from Citi Bank regarding my Citi Bank XXXX Anywhere credit card. The bill amounted to over {$8000.00} and I immediately checked the listed charges. I found that there were 81 charges made on my card that were not made by me. They were made by a mister XXXX XXXX and all were made in the area of XXXX XXXX XXXX. It was noticed that somehow XXXX had hacked into my account and became an " authorized user ''. I immediately called Citi Bank and they provided a conditional credit for 24 of the charges and I was told not pay. I later received an email requesting information for one charge from XXXX XXXX for {$140.00} regarding a sales slip, receipt, etc. regarding this purchase. I certainly had no such information and thought this email wasn't legitimate. I later received a letter stating that since I hadn't responded all of the disputed charges were not resolved in my favor. In addition there were 57 additional fraudulent charges from the same person in the XXXX XXXX  XXXX area. This created a total of 81 fraudulent charges for a total amount of {$7500.00}. Further checking by me showed that the Citi Bank fraud and dispute center stated the card used in these disputes had a card number ending in XXXX. I've never had a card with this number. My call regarding this information resulted in no assistance. My daughter called again to try and assist me on XX/XX/year> and was told that within 24 hours I would receive an email and the charges would be reinvestigated. As of today I have not received any response from Citi Bank.
